anchor.value: {\displaystyle g(s)=\operatorname {Re} \left[{\frac {-s^{k}\log(-is)}{k!(2\pi i)^{n}}}\right]={\begin{cases}{\frac {|s|^{k}}{4k!(2\pi i)^{n-1}}}&n{\text{ odd}}\\[5pt]-{\frac {|s|^{k}\log |s|}{k!(2\pi i)^{n}}}&n{\text{ even.}}\end{cases}}}
